heading: Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 85–861, § 36A72 Stat. 1569Sept. 2, 1958
label: 1231 to 1238 Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 85–861, § 36A72 Stat. 1569Sept. 2, 1958
notes: Section 1231, , , provided for promotion to first lieutenant. See section 14301 et seq. of Title 10, Armed Forces.act Sept. 3, 1954, ch. 1257, title III, § 30868 Stat. 1155
Section 1232, , , provided for promotion to captain, major, and lieutenant colonel to fill vacancies. See section 14301 et seq. of Title 10.act Sept. 3, 1954, ch. 1257, title III, § 30968 Stat. 1156

Section 1233, , , related to promotion to captain, major, and lieutenant colonel regardless of vacancies. See sections 12009 and 14301 et seq. of Title 10.act Sept. 3, 1954, ch. 1257, title III, § 31068 Stat. 1156
Section 1234, , , related to second consideration for promotion. See section 14301 et seq. of Title 10.act Sept. 3, 1954, ch. 1257, title III, § 31168 Stat. 1157
Section 1235, , , related to promotion to colonel and female field grades to fill vacancies. See section 14301 et seq. of Title 10.act Sept. 3, 1954, ch. 1257, title III, § 31268 Stat. 1157
Section 1236, , , provided for promotion to brigadier general and major general to fill vacancies. See section 14301 et seq. of Title 10.act Sept. 3, 1954, ch. 1257, title III, § 31368 Stat. 1157

Section 1237, acts , title III, § 314, ; , , related to method of selection and order of promotion. See section 14301 et seq. of Title 10.Sept. 3, 1954, ch. 125768 Stat. 1158June 30, 1955, ch. 247, § 869 Stat. 222
Section 1238, , , related to total years of service for first nonunit promotion.act Sept. 3, 1954, ch. 1257, title III, § 31568 Stat. 1158
